fn extend_with_zeroes(vec: &mut Vec<u8>, additional: usize) {
    vec.extend(std::iter::repeat(0).take(additional));
}

fn build_vec_from_iter(ptr: *const u8, len: usize) -> Vec<u8> {
    let mut result = Vec::with_capacity(len);
    for i in 0..len {
        result.push(unsafe { *ptr.add(i) });
    }
    result
}

fn zeroed_vec(len: usize) -> Vec<u32> {
    vec![0u32; len]
}

fn build_vec_from_ptr(ptr: *const u8, len: usize) -> Vec<u8> {
    // SAFETY: caller guarantees ptr is valid for len bytes and properly aligned.
    let mut result = Vec::with_capacity(len);
    unsafe {
        std::ptr::copy_nonoverlapping(ptr, result.as_mut_ptr(), len);
        result.set_len(len);
    }
    result
}
